description: Search the workspace for a pattern using ripgrep. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers. Use this instead of bash when you need to find occurrences of a string or regex.

pattern.description: Search pattern (regular expression, or a literal string when fixed_strings is true).

path.description: Optional directory or file to search within, relative to workspace root. Defaults to the entire workspace.

fixed_strings.description: When true, treat the pattern as a literal string rather than a regex. Defaults to false.

include.description: Optional glob to restrict searched files, e.g. '*.rs' or '*.py'.

max_results.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. Defaults to 200.
